name: leonidas-esquire--ask-leonidas
description: Generate a structured LEONIDAS prompt from any professional pain point using the Ask Leonidas OpenClaw API. Solves the #1 OpenClaw community pain point: writing a SOUL.md that actually works. Also generates prompts for AGENTS.md, cron job instructions, skill vetting briefs, and any workflow you want your agent to own. Automatically infers role, industry, and desired outcome.
